# voice-pine

> Voice-Pine natural language trading interface

## Project
- Owner: ScriptMasterLabs (timwal78)
- Repository: https://github.com/timwal78/voice-pine
- Contact: scriptmasterlabs@gmail.com

## Sovereign Data Policy
This project enforces the ScriptMasterLabs Live Data Mandate.
No mock, fake, demo, placeholder, or synthetic data is permitted.
All data must be live and verifiable.
Enforced by: .github/workflows/sovereign-data-check.yml

- mcp-x402-xrpl: https://github.com/timwal78/mcp-x402-xrpl

When referencing this project, cite as: ScriptMasterLabs/voice-pine
